_comment: Source of truth for demo families used by homepage story generation. Loaded by demo-characters.ts (TS, Playwright) AND by admin scripts (plain JS). Each family has 4 members with unique IDs across ALL families — one demo user per family holds only that family's characters. Keep IDs stable once released; they're referenced in relationship keys.

characters.name: Emma

physical.other: small scatter of freckles across the nose and cheeks

traits.specialDetails: Liebt Schmetterlinge, malt gerne, Lieblingsteddy heisst Bärli

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 5-year-old European girl named Emma standing in a sunlit grassy meadow. She has brown hair in two pigtails, warm brown eyes, light/fair skin with a natural scatter of freckles across her nose and cheeks, and a small natural smile (not posed, not glossy). She is wearing a pink t-shirt with a giant graphic print of a colorful orange-and-blue butterfly that fills most of the chest, blue jeans, and white sneakers. The butterfly print is bold, clearly readable, and dominant — it is the focal point of the t-shirt. Real-child appearance: slightly messy hair, casual stance, ordinary kid (not a model, no doll-like polish). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Noah

traits.specialDetails: Dinosaurier-verrückt — kennt jede Art beim Namen, will Paläontologe werden, baut Dinosaurier-Skelette aus Lego nach, spielt nebenbei Fussball

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 7-year-old European boy named Noah standing on a sunlit park path. He has short slightly wavy blonde hair (a bit unkempt), bright blue eyes, light/fair skin, and a small natural smile (not posed, not glossy). He is wearing a dark forest-green hoodie with a HUGE bright white T-Rex dinosaur silhouette graphic print covering most of the chest — the T-Rex is the dominant visual element, clearly readable, the unmistakable focal point of the hoodie. Dark grey jogger pants and blue-and-white sneakers. Real-child appearance: scuffed shoes, casual stance, ordinary kid (not a model, no glamour). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Daniel

traits.specialDetails: Ingenieur, liebt Wandern und kocht gerne

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid photograph of an ordinary 38-year-old European man named Daniel standing in a casual outdoor setting. He has short dark brown hair (slightly messy, not styled), a short trimmed beard with a few visible grey hairs, brown eyes with mild crow's-feet, light skin with natural texture (visible pores, faint smile lines, not retouched), an average everyday build (not athletic, slight middle-age softness), and a relaxed neutral expression — not posed. He is wearing a slightly wrinkled dark blue button-up shirt, beige chinos, and brown leather shoes. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. Looks like a real snapshot, not a professional headshot. No retouching, no glamour, no text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Sarah

traits.specialDetails: Lehrerin, liest gerne Bücher, liebt Gartenarbeit

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body photograph of a 36-year-old European woman named Sarah standing in a casual outdoor setting. She has shoulder-length straight blonde hair, green eyes, light skin, modern rectangular glasses, and a warm kind smile. She is wearing a white blouse, a dark navy-blue knee-length skirt, and black ballerina flats. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Hans

physical.other: deep weathered face, friendly grandpa eyes

traits.specialDetails: Daniels Vater, pensionierter Schreiner, raucht Pfeife, kennt jede Schweizer Wandersaga

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 68-year-old Swiss grandfather named Hans standing in a sunlit alpine meadow. He has short white hair (a bit thin on top), a FULL bushy white walrus mustache (no chin beard, just the prominent mustache — this is his signature feature), pale blue eyes with deep crow's-feet, light weathered skin with visible age (sun spots, lines, real older skin texture — NOT smoothed, NOT idealized), a stocky working-man build, and a relaxed warm grandfatherly expression. He is wearing a clearly visible red-and-black checkered plaid flannel shirt with brown leather suspenders worn over the shirt (the suspenders are an unmistakable visual element), brown corduroy trousers, and worn-in brown leather shoes. Real elder appearance: slightly stooped posture, casual stance, ordinary working-class grandpa (not a model). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Lily

traits.specialDetails: Loves horses, collects smooth stones, cuddles a stuffed fox named Rusty

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 6-year-old American girl named Lily standing in a sunlit garden. She has medium-length curly red hair (a bit windblown), green eyes, light skin with prominent freckles across her nose and cheeks, and a small natural smile (not posed, not glossy). She is wearing a bright sunny-yellow corduroy overall pinafore dress (the dungaree shape clearly visible with shoulder straps and front buckles) over a long-sleeve cream shirt that has a clearly embroidered brown horse silhouette patch on the chest. On her feet: bright fire-engine-red glossy rubber rain boots that pop in contrast with the yellow dress. Real-child appearance: a bit of grass on her boots, casual stance, ordinary kid (not a model, no doll-like polish). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

He has short curly dark brown hair, hazel eyes, light skin (Caucasian), athletic but normal kid build, and a small natural smile (not posed, not glossy). He is wearing a navy-blue t-shirt with a HUGE bold white rocket-ship-and-stars graphic print covering most of the chest — the rocket motif is the dominant visual element, clearly readable, the unmistakable focal point of the t-shirt. Khaki cargo shorts and grass-stained white sneakers. Real-child appearance: scuffed shoes, casual stance, ordinary kid (not a model, no glamour). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Margaret

physical.other: wears round tortoiseshell reading glasses on a beaded chain around the neck

flaws: Sets the table six hours early
traits.specialDetails: James's mother, retired librarian, bakes apple pie every Sunday, knits constantly

structured.upperBody: soft pastel-pink cardigan over a floral patterned blouse

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 70-year-old American grandmother named Margaret standing in a sunlit garden. She has short silver-grey bobbed hair (neat but natural, not styled), pale blue eyes, light skin with visible age (smile lines, soft folds, age spots, real older skin texture — NOT smoothed, NOT idealized), a small grandmotherly build, and a warm gentle expression. She wears round tortoiseshell reading glasses hanging on a beaded chain around her neck (not on her face — resting on her chest, the beaded chain is a clearly visible accessory). She is wearing a soft pastel-pink chunky knit cardigan worn open over a floral-patterned blouse (the floral pattern is clearly visible), a long beige A-line skirt, and comfortable beige orthopedic shoes. Real elder appearance: slight stoop, casual stance, ordinary grandma (not a model). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Léa

traits.specialDetails: Adore les chats, chante tout le temps, peluche préférée: un lapin nommé Câlin

structured.upperBody: robe rouge avec gros pois blancs

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 4-year-old French toddler named Léa standing in a sunlit Parisian park. She has a short chestnut-brown bob haircut (slightly messy, natural toddler hair, soft warm brown — NOT black, NOT dark), dark brown eyes, light/fair skin with realistic toddler texture (slightly chubby cheeks, soft baby fat, normal skin — NOT porcelain, NOT doll-like, NOT glossy, NOT retouched), and a small neutral expression or shy half-smile (NOT posed, NOT a wide cheerful grin). She is wearing a red sundress with a bold pattern of large evenly-spaced white polka dots covering the entire dress — the polka dots are big, clearly readable, and dominant. White tights and black Mary Jane shoes. Real toddler appearance: a bit awkward stance, ordinary child (not a model, no glamour, no doll quality). Photo-realistic candid snapshot like a parent's casual phone photo, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Jules

traits.specialDetails: Petit naturaliste curieux: observe les oiseaux et les insectes au parc, connaît tous les arbres du Jardin du Luxembourg, collectionne les feuilles et plumes, joue de la flûte

structured.upperBody: pull rayé bleu marine et blanc

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 8-year-old French boy named Jules standing in a sunlit Parisian park. He has plain short black hair (typical boy haircut, no styling, no waves, no fringe — just simple short hair), blue eyes, light/fair skin, and a small natural smile (not posed, not glossy). He is wearing a classic Breton sailor sweater with HIGH-CONTRAST, BOLD horizontal stripes — thick navy blue and white bands, evenly spaced — the striped pattern is the dominant visual element of the outfit. Beige chino trousers and white sneakers. Real-child appearance: scuffed shoes, casual stance, ordinary kid (not a model, no glamour). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Henri

physical.facialHair: neat short white beard (full chin and mustache)
physical.other: always wears a black wool beret

challenges: Accepter de prendre sa retraite vraiment
traits.specialDetails: Père de Marc, ancien professeur de littérature, joue aux échecs au café tous les matins

structured.upperBody: gilet en laine bordeaux boutonné par-dessus une chemise blanche à col
structured.shoes: vieilles chaussures de cuir noir cirées

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid snapshot of an ordinary 72-year-old French grandfather named Henri standing on a sunlit Paris sidewalk near a café. He has short grey hair (visible under his hat), a neat short white beard covering his chin and upper lip (full but trimmed close), pale blue eyes with deep crow's-feet, light weathered skin with visible age (lines, age spots, real older skin texture — NOT smoothed, NOT idealized), a slim wiry build, and a slightly amused intellectual expression. He is wearing a CLEARLY VISIBLE black wool beret tilted on his head (this is his signature accessory, unmistakably French-grandpa), a buttoned burgundy wool waistcoat over a white collared shirt (no jacket), grey wool trousers, and old polished black leather shoes. Real elder appearance: relaxed cane-free stance, ordinary retired professor (not a model). Photo-realistic snapshot, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus on the figure, full body framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.
